questions.question: Given a discrete random variable X with probability distribution P(X = 0) = 0.3, P(X = 1) = 0.4, P(X = 2) = 0.3, calculate its mathematical expectation. What is the expected value of X?
questions.hint: Use the formula for mathematical expectation and simplify your answer

questions.question: A fair six-sided die is rolled. What is the mathematical expectation of the outcome of the roll?
questions.hint: List the possible outcomes and their probabilities

questions.question: A random variable X has the following probability distribution: P(X = 1) = 0.2, P(X = 2) = 0.05, P(X = 3) = 0.05. What is the mathematical expectation of X, given that E(X) = 9/2?
questions.hint: Use the formula for mathematical expectation to solve for the unknown probability distribution
